
--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{"products":[{"lead":{"__typename":"Employee","id":1}},{},{}]},"pending":[{"id":"1","path":["products"]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"derivedMood":"HAPPY"},"id":"1","subPath":[0,"lead"]}],"completed":[{"id":"1"}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql
--graphql--
